chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 939 of 2011 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions 1. For hearing of CMA No.7759/2023 (C/A) 2. For hearing of CMA No.6789/2020 (C/A) 07.03.2024 Mr. Rasheed Ahmed, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Imran Qureshi, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- In this matter the fact of compliance of order being made was recorded on 30.01.2024 when Attorney of petitioners was present but his Counsel was absent. From a tentative perusal of compliance report, it was apparent that the amount duly calculated has already been disbursed to the petitioners, but petitioners were disputing the amount without, however, offering any alternate figure of amount with evidence. Hence, as a last chance, matter was adjourned to today, but Mr. Imran Qureshi, learned Counsel for petitioners has chosen to remain absent and the Counsel holding brief for him has not offered any reason to still keep the listed application alive. In view of above, listed applications, in the light of the fact that substantial compliance has been made, are disposed of accordingly. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
